programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Nick's a lucky guy. Tonight, he'll be having dinner with Jill Goddard, the hottest actress on earth. She's promoting her latest movie and he's won the main prize in an online contest. Then he gets a call. Some guy named Chord explains that dinner has been cancelled. And it's Jill's fault: she's a high- maintenance diva, and everybody hates her guts. Chord says he can make up for it.

programme.title: Coral Reef
programme.desc: In between the thousands of islands of Indonesia is a remote natural paradise that hosts an incredibly diverse marine life - in fact it is the most species rich environment on our planet.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo World At His Feet
programme.desc: Cristiano Ronaldo: The World at His Feet follows the footballer from his beginnings in Portugal, breakthrough start with Manchester United and current career at Real Madrid.

programme.title: Little Accidents
programme.desc: In a small American town still living in the shadow of a terrible coal mine accident, the disappearance of a teenage boy draws together a surviving miner, the lonely wife of a mine executive, and a local boy in a web of secrets.

programme.title: Love in Tahiti
programme.desc: Brielle has always believed the ocean floor is full of treasures just waiting to be found. Over the years she has dived to find coins, lost jewelry and more in the waters of Tahiti. Instead of profiting from them, she loves reuniting people with their lost valuables. When she finds a class ring and returns it to Marcus, a handsome US Navy serviceman, Brielle soon discovers what has been missing in her life – a treasure of the heart.

programme.title: Bookworm and the Beast
programme.desc: Izzy is ready to make a difference in the world as she starts her career in public relations. When Grant Beiste - the big-headed corporate celebrity in town - accidentally hits her father with a car, Izzy is thrown into a public scandal that forces her to work closely with Grant. As she fights to save both her father and Grant's public image, she falls in love and learns not to judge a book by it's cover.

programme.title: Finding Love In Mountain View
programme.desc: After learning she's been entrusted to take care of her deceased cousin's children, an architect is torn between focusing on her career and honoring her cousin's wish.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: Against a Crooked Sky
programme.desc: A lone gunman tracks down the members of an outlaw gang that killed his friends.

programme.title: Git Along Little Dogies
programme.desc: When war breaks out between oilmen and cattle ranchers, Gene sides with the ranchers until he learns that oil will bring a railroad to town.

programme.title: Bury Me Not
programme.desc: Two women hide the surprising truth as a sheriff investigates a murder.

programme.title: Fort Ti
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the French and Indian war in colonial America, the British soldiers attempt to route the French Army from Fort Ticonderoga.

programme.title: Ride Out for Revenge
programme.desc: When an Indian chief is murdered in a hateful town, a sympathizing ex marshal tries to stop the Indians from attacking for revenge.

programme.title: Buckaroo: The Winchester Does Not Forgive
programme.desc: The Winchester Does Not Forgive - When the stagecoach in which they travel is attacked by Monteiro's gang, Lash accepts to kill his friend to save his bacon.

programme.title: A Christmas to Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett is a chef but every year her holiday dishes never sell. So this year, her best friend buys her a ticket for a holiday...maybe she will find love in a handsome rival chef from her past, and regain the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Christmas Wish
programme.desc: When Paula chose Gary over Nick, 15 years later she'd be married, with tons of debt. At Christmas, when Nick reappears, now a rich, successful art broker. A little Christmas magic and she is transported to the life with Nick.

programme.title: Time for me to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Cara faces a bittersweet Christmas since her mother's passing. Flying to Oklahoma, she meets country singer Heath, facing a tough holiday too since his father's death.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: When workaholic Jillian gets a note that her long-lost, wealthy uncle has passed away, she finds he's left her his beautiful mountainside cabin – and a family she never knew existed. Jillian's plan is to sell the cabin as soon as possible and move on, but when she meets handsome caretaker Liam, he makes her an offer she can't refuse. Sparks fly as they work together to transform the cabin into a holiday resort. When business doesn't go as planned and she almost loses her newfound family, Jillian needs to make a decision. Will she give up everything for the love she never saw coming?

programme.title: Rock-A-Doodle
programme.desc: An iconic family favourite from legendary director Don Bluth and featuring the voice of Oscar Winner Christopher Plummer. A contemporary take on the classic fish-out-of-water story as a rooster, who is tricked in to leaving town to seek fame as an Elvis-style Las Vegas singer, teams up with a young boy and a group of barnyard animals on a magical journey to defeat the Grand Duke of Owls.

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Abby Morel is a bright, young editor's assistant living in the big city. Wanting to get ahead in her career, she makes an unusual deal with her high-flying boss, Susan. Susan is far too busy to date, but she wants to fall in love. Abby agrees to ‘screen' dates in exchange for a promotion, and to add to the pressure, Susan is looking for the perfect man! After a couple of disasters, Abby meets Dan, who seemingly ticks all the boxes. The trouble is, she's starting to fall for him too… A promising career now within her reach, will she risk losing it all for true love?

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: Sarah Miles, desperate to escape her abusive husband, reaches out to a new friend she meets online, only to discover he's an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: Onegin
programme.desc: Russia, 1820s: Onegin inherits his uncle's country estate and moves there from St. Petersburg. He befriends his neighbor, Lensky, and meets Tatyana through him. She falls in love with Onegin but he just wants friendship.

programme.title: Cyrano de Bergerac
programme.desc: The charismatic swordsman-poet helps another woo the woman he loves in this straightforward version of the play.

programme.title: Dark Moon Rising
programme.desc: Small-town girl meets mysterious drifter boy, they fall in love. Only in this case, the boy brings with him a family curse and unimaginable horror that rains hell upon the small town.

programme.title: Day Zero
programme.desc: Day Zero follows the lives of three best friends in New York City who have thirty days to come to terms with their fate, being drafted into the military. Rifkin (CHRIS KLEIN) is a married lawyer whose career is on the rise. Feller (ELIJAH WOOD) is working on his second novel. The first was a smash success, but he's having a writer's block. Dixon (JON BERNTHAL) drives a cab and lives a solitary life. Over thirty days, they will find their relationships tested as they confront long held beliefs about life, death, courage and love.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A scheming widow hatches a daring plan to get her hands on her late husband's inheritance, unbeknownst to her that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks within the family's estate.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: House of Cards
programme.desc: A widow tries to find out why her daughter's strange behavior, a reaction to the death of her father, is progressively worsening.

programme.title: A Boy Called Sailboat
programme.desc: A small family finds hope in their extraordinary son named Sailboat when a personal gesture awakens a global desire.

programme.title: My Zoe
programme.desc: Prepare for one of the most emotionally-engaging film of the year. My Zoe is a heartbreaking family drama with a dystopian science fiction twist starring Julie Delpy (Before Sunrise), Richard Armitage (The Hobbit franchise, The Stranger), Gemma Arterton (Summerland) and Daniel Brühl (Captain America: Civil War). Isabelle (Julie Delpy) is a divorcee recovering from a toxic marriage but still forced into contact with her ex (Richard Armitage) because they are co-parenting their daughter Zoe. When tragedy strikes this fractured family, Isabelle - a top-level scientist - takes matters into her own hands an unexpected and shocking way."

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In a world where the government records and taxes dreams, an unassuming dream auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageingeccentric. Albert Birney and Kentucker Audley's Strawberry Mansion is a cult classic in the making - a stylish, eccentric, thrilling and charmingly off-the-wall fantasy starring Kentucker Audley (Her Smell), Penny Fuller (All The President's Men), Grace Glowicki (Tito) and Reed Birney (Mass) - plus a fantastic hypnotic score from electronic musician Dan Deacon.

programme.title: Dominion: The Last Star Warrior
programme.desc: In five days the world changed. As a retired Intelligence agent turned UFO investigator races to discover the fate of the human race, an alien observer searchs for the human woman he loves.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: Bad Date Chronicles
programme.desc: Jeri Jones runs the popular website ‘Bad Date Chronicles' where daters can go to anonymously post horrible date experiences. Realizing he's the subject of one of the posts, rival blogger Jack Collins dares Jeri to three dates in an attempt to prove he's not such a bad guy after all.

programme.title: In The Moon's Shadow
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters amid tragedy unlock the truth to family secrets on a self-reflecting journey to see the Great American Eclipse.

programme.title: Aberrant
programme.desc: Cole (Jack Quaid) stirs everyone up during his best friend's wedding as something seems off between him and the bride.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: As I Am
programme.desc: One week of school remains for Kai, an aspiring writer, and his friends. How they spend this time will cost one of them their life and leave them changed forever.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: Nominated for five Academy Awards® including a win for Best Costume Design, Martin Scorsese's 1993 adaptation of Edith Wharton's novel is set in the elegant milieu of the oldest and richest families in 1870s New York. Marriages are like treaties between nations, their purpose not to cement romance or produce children, but to provide for the orderly transmission of wealth between the generations.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley Albright (LINDSAY LOHAN) is the luckiest woman in the world, a person to whom all the good things in life have come far too easily. She can pick a lottery ticket at random and hit the jackpot. In New York, the world's busiest city, Ashley never has to wait for a cab. And she has a terrific job as an account exec at a prestigious public relations firm. Everything goes Ashley's way. And now, she's been given a great opportunity to advance her career: she is to plan a masquerade ball in downtown Manhattan for record mogul Damon Phillips (Faizon Love) and his company.

programme.title: Hellboy: Sword of Storms
programme.desc: A folklore professor becomes unwittingly possessed by the ancient Japanese demons of Thunder and Lightning.

programme.title: Beyond Sherwood Forest
programme.desc: The Sheriff of Nottingham unleashes a monster to massacre Robin Hood's men and capture Maid Marian.

programme.title: Prince Valiant
programme.desc: When King Arthur's legendary sword is stolen, a squire named Valiant rises to restore the balance of power.

programme.title: Beyond Sherwood Forest
programme.desc: The Sheriff of Nottingham unleashes a monster to massacre Robin Hood's men and capture Maid Marian.

programme.title: Can't Come Out To Play
programme.desc: A disturbing, skin-crawling horror thriller, featuring a stand-out performance from Michael Shannon (The Iceman) and directed by John McNaughton (Wild Things). A mentally unstable physician (Samantha Morton: Minority Report) keeps her dying son secluded from the outside world in a bid to preserve his life. Experience this chilling, psychological horror about a mother's obsessive love. A must see!

programme.title: The Furies
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. The Furies is Halloween meets The Hunger Games in this gripping & fast paced female-driven survival thriller. A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game. A game that can only have one winner.

programme.title: Wheeler
programme.desc: An emotional, uplifting drama starring Stephen Dorff (Immortals) and featuring country music legend Kris Kristofferson (Blade). Aspiring musician Wheeler travels to Nashville with the lifelong dream of trying his hand at country music. As Wheeler chases his dream, the line between reality and fiction blurs in this touching and enlightening tribute to old school country legends.

programme.title: Valhalla: Legend of Thor
programme.desc: No man, woman or child may defy the gods. When Thor and Loki seek refuge in the home of mortals, the youngest son fails to heed a warning from the gods. As atonement for the family's sins, the gods take the two youngest children under their wing and embark on an epic adventure from Midgard to Valhalla that will see them stare down ruthless giants, barbaric gods and the dreaded wolf Fenrir.

programme.title: Run To Me
programme.desc: An amateur triathlete falls under the spell of a controversial trainer who utilizes experimental hypnotherapy. Starring Claire Forlani (2016)

programme.title: A Friend's Obsession
programme.desc: After moving across the country, a woman befriends an old colleague who will stop at nothing to make her his. Starring Karissa Lee Staples (2018)

programme.title: The Wrong Daughter
programme.desc: A couple's long lost daughter reappears into a couple's life only to discover that she in an imposter. Starring Sydney Sweeney (2018)

programme.title: No Surrender
programme.desc: American Beauty star Mena Suvari is a a successful writer who encourages women not to suffer violent relationships. However she soon becomes the target of a crazed male stalker. (2011)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: Kyra's dream of becoming a jeweller might come to fruition. Little does she know someone has manifested a life for her too. (2020)

programme.title: LOVE TO THE RESCUE
programme.desc: Kate and Eric are single parents who adopt the same dog.

programme.title: All Of My Heart
programme.desc: A young caterer's life changes forever when she inherits half of a country house. With the other half belonging to a career-obsessed Wall Street trader, will they prove that opposites attract? (2015)

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: All Yours
programme.desc: Cass is a single mother and high-powered lawyer who hires a handsome family friend as a nanny. But will Cass ultimately take a chance on love? Nicollette Sheridan and Dan Payne star. (2016)

programme.title: The Good Shepherd
programme.desc: The history of over 40 years in the CIA, told through the eyes of James Wilson, one of its founding officers.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers, Jack and Joy, awaken together to discover they've gotten married following a night of debauchery in Sin City, and one of them has won a huge jackpot after playing the other's quarter. When a judge refuses to have the marriage annulled, the newlyweds devise ever-escalating schemes to undermine each other and get their hands on the money – only to find themselves falling in love amid the mutual backstabbing.

programme.title: 55 Steps
programme.desc: 55 Steps is based a the inspiring true story of Eleanor Riese, a mental illness patient herself, who brings a class action suit to give competent mental patients the right to have a say in their medication while they're in a hospital, and Colette Hughes, the lawyer appointed to her case.

programme.title: Before You Know It
programme.desc: An unmissable New-York- based “dramedy” in the vein of Woody Allen. Stage manager Rachel (Hannah Pearl Utt) is the only thing standing between her family and utter chaos. She then discovers that her presumed-dead mother (Judith Light: Transparent) is alive and thriving as a soap-opera star! Also starring, Mike Colter (Luke Cage) and Alec Baldwin (It's Complicated). Funny and moving!

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: In a world ravaged by a virus infection, turning its victims into the Undead, Alice (Jovovich), continues on her journey to find survivors and lead them to safety. Her deadly battle with the Umbrella Corporation reaches new heights, but Alice gets some unexpected help from an old friend. A new lead that promises a safe haven from the Undead takes them to Los Angeles, but when they arrive the city is overrun by thousands of Undead - and Alice and her comrades are about to step into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: A tough female ex-con and her recalcitrant 6-year-old charge go on the run from the mob.

programme.title: Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid
programme.desc: A team of scientists braves the dangers of the rain forest in search of a flower that contains a youth serum.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: Take two guys, suitable for framing, get them in trouble, land them in jail... and you have a comedy guaranteed to drive anyone STIR CRAZY

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: Two clueless teenagers unwittingly get involved in the Watergate scandal that brought down the Nixon administration.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: In this modern epic, Kim Nguyen exposes the ruthless edge of our increasingly digital world. Cousins from New York, Vincent (Jesse Eisenberg) and Anton (Alexander Skarsgård) are players in the high-stakes game of High Frequency Trading. Their dream? To build a fiber-optic cable straight line between Kansas and New Jersey, making them millions. Together they push each other and everyone around them to breaking point on their quixotic adventure, while their old boss Eva Torres (Salma Hayek) will stop at nothing to beat them at their own game.

programme.title: Dear Eleanor
programme.desc: Two teenage girls travel across the U.S. in 1962, during the chaos of the Cuban missile crisis, in search of Eleanor Roosevelt.

programme.title: Give Them Wings
programme.desc: The award-winning true story of severely disabled Paul Hodgson - a man who fought back, and won. Paul (Daniel Watson) was diagnosed with childhood meningitis aged just 10 months old and his parents (Toyah Willcox and Bill Fellows) were told he would never move or speak. Give Them Wings charts Paul's incredible journey of survival against the odds - it's a tough but heart-warming story of love and friendship, of struggles and acceptance, of football and learning to fly!

programme.title: Louder Than Words
programme.desc: After the unexpected death of their daughter, a couple work to build a state of the art children's hospital where families are welcomed into the healing process.

programme.title: Away From Her
programme.desc: After 45 years of marriage, Fiona and Grant are struck with a devastating blow, the looming clouds of Alzheimer's disease. In a heart-breaking decision, Fiona is moved into a residential facility. But there's one more shock on the horizon as Fiona starts to transfer her affections to another man at the nursing home. A double-Oscar-nominated, beautifully subtle exploration of a devastating disease.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Fortress: Sniper's Eye is an explosive, all-out-action cyber-thriller starring action megastar Bruce Willis with Jesse Metcalfe (Escape Plan II) and Chad Michael Murray (Riverdale). Weeks after the deadly assault on Fortress Camp, Robert (Willis) makes a daring rescue to save Sasha, the widow of his old nemesis Balzary (Murray). But back in the camp's command bunker, it appears Sasha may have devious plans of her own. As a new attack breaks out, Robert is confronted with a familiar face he thought he'd never see again. Fortress: Sniper's Eye is from the producers of Lone Survivor and The Irishman and directed by Josh Sternfeld (Meskada).

programme.title: Saints & Soliders: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: On August 15th 1944, the 517th Parachute Regimental Combat Team (PRCT) jumped over the south of France. In their effort to complete the mission and rendezvous with their unit, three isolated paratroopers come across a group of French resistants in desperate need. They decide to help liberate some of the captive partisans but in doing so they risk their lives. They are the Airborne Creed.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: During the warring period of the three kingdoms, ancient China is in turmoil. To unify the country general Cao Cao (Jiang Wen), enlists the aid of the greatest warrior in the land Guan Yun Change (Donnie Yen). However, Guan Yun Chang is a loyal friend of Cao Cao's enemy Liu Bei. To persuade the peerless warrior to fight, Cao Cao takes his beloved Qi Lan (Sun Li) hostage.

programme.title: Instrument of War
programme.desc: Instrument Of War is an harrowing yet uplifting true story about survival against seemingly impossible odds. When U.S. B-24 bomber pilot Clair Cline is shot down and captured in northern Germany, one war ends and another begins -- to keep hope alive. Now behind Nazi barbed wire Cline and his fellow POW's must find a way to bond together to try and survive the hell they find themselves in.

programme.title: White Vengeance
programme.desc: White Vengeance tells the story of two brothers contending for supremacy during the fall of the Qin Dynasty, which ruled Imperial China from 221 to 206 BC. As rebels rose, the nation fell into chaos. Liu Bang and Xiang Yu, became leaders of the rebellious army, and also became sworn brothers in battle.

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In this episode Nicola and Craig explore Victoria Falls and Hwange National park. The two meet vervet monkeys in the Victoria Falls rain forest and learn the basics of monkey language. Nicola learns about baboon behavior with newborns

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In this epsiode Craig and Nicola witness a pride of lion feeding on a rotten hippo carcass while displaying visual cues of defense. The two observe the defensive behavior of elephants toward a pride of lion.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Bucketlist Europe
programme.desc: Europe is a densely packed continent, with some 700 million residents living across 50 countries. It's famed for its ancient cities and civilisations, but is sometimes overlooked when it comes to the natural world. But there's no doubt that the continent is a treasure trove of natural beauty, a mosaic of landscapes each filled with their own unique animal communities. If you were planning a bucket list trip of the natural wonders of Europe, you'd only have to ask yourself one question: where would you start?

programme.title: New Life: Born to Swim
programme.desc: It's a water world and life couldn't survive without it. And thanks to it, a mind blowing diversity of creatures thrive beneath the surface. Born to enjoy the riches underwater they must master their body's adaptations, learn to find food, to escape danger and above all become expert swimmers! Whether it's in rivers, on beaches or in the deep ocean, all must overcome the obstacles and fulfil their destiny, all are born to swim! Of all the habitats on earth, the ocean is perhaps the most challenging. Here salt, temperatures, currents and predators can make life difficult it's not an obvious place to want to bring up your babies… But even in these waters generation after generation beats the odds. They have overcome the challenges and become some of the most beautiful and graceful of creatures. But any baby born to swim has a lot to learn… All over the world there are creatures born to swim, and though humans are not, we seem determined to join them. Perhaps we are envious of their grace. Maybe we are all water babies at heart

programme.title: Missing Butterflies
programme.desc: Its miraculous transformation from caterpillar to remarkable winged beauty has been a point of constant intrigue. However, in the last few years, many have observed a decrease in the butterfly population. A much-discussed topic in the entomological society is the decline of the insect populace, but to what extent is this topic relevant to our beloved butterflies? For years, a teacher from lower Bavaria and a biologist from Munich have dedicated themselves to studying the butterfly and their presence in Bavaria. The results of their studies tell an enlightening story that is sure to entertain.

programme.title: Rewilding: Back to Nature
programme.desc: Worldwide, there are various projects and approaches to give nature more space again. The aim is to create larger wilderness areas that develop with hardly any influence of humans - by reintroducing so-called key animal species and creating a network of wilderness corridors across entire continents. Rewilding promises to be a cost-effective form of conservation in which we can boost biodiversity and protect the climate.

programme.title: Survival of the Fittest in the Alps
programme.desc: The documentary shows the survival strategies of various animal species in the high mountains of the Alps in winter. Despite freezing temperatures and limited food supply, chamois, red deer and snow hares manage to survive the cold months. Latest research reveals the amazing abilities the animals have developed to adapt to the extreme conditions and also how climate change is altering the behaviour of the alpine inhabitants.

programme.title: Wild Prairie Man
programme.desc: Located in the Northern Great Plains of Canada, Grasslands National Park has been a 20 year odyssey for wildlife photographer James R. Page. For James, critters are more interesting than people and he shares some of his iconic images and experiences from this endangered ecosystem. We showcase the parks wilderness that is dominated by prairie light and dark sky, the wildlife, prairie dogs, mesmerizing landscapes, and bisons. We immerse ourselves in the wild habitat of Grasslands National Park for over a year capturing some never before scenes in the Wild Prairie. James R. Page's connection to the land and the wildlife provides an unforgettable journey into the heart of this endangered ecosystem, while Park experts help us understand its complexity.

programme.title: Crazy Creature Costumes
programme.desc: Animals shock us with the most bizarre appearances - some even look like they've been dressing up. But the weird and wonderful shapes and colours of nature are vital to the animals' lives. Sometimes they're disguised to help blend in, other times they are designed to stand out and show off. But whether it's a monkey in make-up or a salamander's toxic stripes, the weird and wonderful outfits enable the creature to thrive.

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: It's no news that cuckoos are brood parasites: they lay their eggs into the nests of other bird species – a clever trick that spares the rearing of own offspring. Some even go as far as to kill the other chicks in the nest. But why do other parent birds let this happen? Are they too stupid? Too inept? Or simply clueless? Admittedly, cuckoo's eggs do look deceptively genuine. But the cuckoo chick? Not even remotely! It quickly grows into a giant that looks nothing like its new family. So why don't the adoptive parents notice the sham then? Until recently, the ornithologists' theory was: the “victims” have yet to learn to counteract. Turns out: they may even profit from having strangers' chicks in their nest! So is cuckoo's behaviour a phenomenal trick or an evolutionary riddle?

programme.title: Beak & Brain
programme.desc: These child prodigies of the animal kingdom have feathers and beaks – and very special skills! The Keas of New Zealand are the only parrots that live in snowy mountain areas. They like testing their brains, solving puzzles and challenging tourists: they unscrew bottle-tops, dismantle windscreen wiper blades and tear open rucksacks. They seem so determined you'd think they have an understanding of physics and mechanics! Thousands of miles northwards, in New Caledonia, other birds have talent, too. Here bird expert Gavin Hunt discovered that crows are able to produce a whole set of tools, each designed for a particular purpose – the most intricate tool culture in the animal kingdom! These high flyers compete against each other: Keas vs Crows. What is the secret of their intelligence? It's the ultimate avian I.Q. test, with some funny and surprising results.

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We're here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you're in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We've got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan's Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.
